channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #119: What do you get...
item.description:
What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost?
A poultry-geist!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260602-1808.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost?
item.dadjokefix:punchline: A poultry-geist!
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost? A poultry-geist! 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjoke #dadjokefix #dadjokes #aigenerated #aicontent #wordplay #groanworthy #funnyclips #foryou
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost?
A poultry-geist! 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.
🤖 Hank is an AI character. Voice, face and animation are all generated. . . . #dadjoke #dadjokefix #dadjokes #aigenerated #aicontent #wordplay #groanworthy #funnyclips #foryou
item.dadjokefix:youtube_caption:
What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost?
A poultry-geist!
---

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #118: What's blue and not...
item.description:
What's blue and not very heavy?
Light blue.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260601-2343.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: Light blue.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #117: Did you know that...
item.description:
Did you know that protons have mass?
I didn't even know they were catholic.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260601-2141.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: I didn't even know they were catholic.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #116: How come the stadium...
item.description:
How come the stadium got hot after the game?
Because all of the fans left.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260601-1922.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #115: Ghosts Can't Hide!
item.description:
Why are ghosts bad liars?
Because you can see right through them!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260531-2316.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #114: Burglar's New Decor!
item.description:
Why did the burglar hang his mugshot on the wall?
To prove that he was framed!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260531-1937.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #113: My New Belt is... Interesting
item.description:
I made a belt out of watches once...
It was a waist of time.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260531-1521.mp4

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #112: Boss Gave Me a Task!
item.description:
My boss told me to attach two pieces of wood together...
I totally nailed it!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #111: What Did Elsa Do?
item.description:
You will never guess what Elsa did to the balloon.
She let it go.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260530-1938.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #110: Got a Hole?
item.description:
Is there a hole in your shoe?
No… Then how’d you get your foot in it?
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260530-1516.mp4

item.title: Joke Court Friday #109: What's the Ninth Letter?
item.description:
Someone asked me, what's the ninth letter of the alphabet?
It was a complete guess, but I was right.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260529-2339.mp4

item.title: Joke Court Friday #108: Snowman's Strange Scent!
item.description:
What did one snowman say to the other snow man?
Do you smell carrot?
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260529-2036.mp4

item.title: Joke Court Friday #107: Snow way, Dad!
item.description:
"Dad, do you think it's going to snow this winter?
" "I dont know, its all up in the air"
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260529-1737.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Throwback Thursday #106: Golfing Advice!
item.description:
Did you know you should always take an extra pair of pants golfing?
Just in case you get a hole in one.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260528-2341.mp4

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #103: Roosters Can...?
item.description:
What's the difference between a rooster and a crow?
A rooster can crow but a crow cannot rooster.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260527-2337.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #102: Orange You Glad He Got Fired?
item.description:

Lack of concentration.

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #101: What dog works with science?
item.description:
What kind of dog lives in a particle accelerator?
A Fermilabrador Retriever.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #100: Spaghetti Car?!
item.description:
My sister bet me $15 that I couldn't build a car out of spaghetti.
You should have seen the look on her face as I drove pasta.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260526-2320.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
